mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_statistics_daily ( stat_date, total_sessions, active_sessions, new_sessions, total_messages, user_messages, assistant_messages, avg_message_length, total_tokens, skill_executions, document_uploads, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{statDate}, #{totalSessions}, #{activeSessions}, #{newSessions}, #{totalMessages}, #{userMessages}, #{assistantMessages}, #{avgMessageLength}, #{totalTokens}, #{skillExecutions}, #{documentUploads}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_sessions = VALUES(total_sessions), active_sessions = VALUES(active_sessions), new_sessions = VALUES(new_sessions), total_messages = VALUES(total_messages), user_messages = VALUES(user_messages), assistant_messages = VALUES(assistant_messages), avg_message_length = VALUES(avg_message_length), total_tokens = VALUES(total_tokens), skill_executions = VALUES(skill_executions), document_uploads = VALUES(document_uploads), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)

INSERT INTO ai_statistics_daily ( stat_date, total_sessions, active_sessions, new_sessions, total_messages, user_messages, assistant_messages, avg_message_length, total_tokens, skill_executions, document_uploads, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.statDate}, #{item.totalSessions}, #{item.activeSessions}, #{item.newSessions}, #{item.totalMessages}, #{item.userMessages}, #{item.assistantMessages}, #{item.avgMessageLength}, #{item.totalTokens}, #{item.skillExecutions}, #{item.documentUploads}, #{item.updatedAt} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_sessions = VALUES(total_sessions), active_sessions = VALUES(active_sessions), new_sessions = VALUES(new_sessions), total_messages = VALUES(total_messages), user_messages = VALUES(user_messages), assistant_messages = VALUES(assistant_messages), avg_message_length = VALUES(avg_message_length), total_tokens = VALUES(total_tokens), skill_executions = VALUES(skill_executions), document_uploads = VALUES(document_uploads), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_sessions), 0) as totalSessions, COALESCE(SUM(total_messages), 0) as totalMessages, COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens), 0) as totalTokens, COALESCE(SUM(skill_executions), 0) as skillExecutions, COALESCE(SUM(document_uploads), 0) as documentUploads FROM ai_statistics_daily WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
